title: Divisione Folgore
writer: Aldo Barni, Oreste Biancoli, Marc-Antonio Bragadin
actors: Fausto Tozzi, Ettore Manni, Monica Clay
plot: In the summer of 1942, during the Second World War, a group of young paratroopers from the Folgore Division, after having been subjected to a long and tiring training in Italy, was transported by air to the Libyan desert to cover ...
